gist.headline: Daily News Refresh
gist.blurb: The hive's bulletin board got its daily dusting. Our automated bot updated the README with the latest news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README's Latest News section.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository landing page current with the latest project announcements.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot updating a bulletin board or reading a newspaper, representing the automated news update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board, while the small bee mascot reads a tiny newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
